summary: AdviceOS Compliance-First Testing - Iteration 93. All 28 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with AdviceOS Dashboard and CRM Command Center working correctly.

minor.issue: Route conflict with compliance.py - renamed to /api/compliance/scenario-check in compliance_engine.py
MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in audit log - fixed by adding sanitize_for_json function
CSV writer fieldnames mismatch - fixed by collecting all fieldnames from all logs

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Route conflict between /api/compliance/check in compliance.py and compliance_engine.py - resolved by renaming to /api/compliance/scenario-check
MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in audit logs - fixed with sanitize_for_json helper function
CSV download fieldnames issue - fixed by collecting all possible fieldnames from all logs
seed_data_creation: Demo data generated via POST /api/reports/generate-demo-data and default licensee/adviser via POST /api/compliance/init-default
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AdviceOS features tested and working. Compliance modal requires localStorage acknowledgment to dismiss. CRM Command Center is at /crm-command-center (not /crm). Backend API endpoint for compliance check is /api/compliance/scenario-check (not /api/compliance/check due to route conflict).

features_verified.AdviceOS Dashboard at /adviceos: PASS - Loads with compliance disclaimer banner
features_verified.Scenario Generator API: PASS - Creates 3+ scenarios (conservative, balanced, growth) with no 'best option' ranking
features_verified.Trade-Off Engine: PASS - Shows risk vs return comparisons in trade_offs array
features_verified.Adviser Decision Layer: PASS - Requires mandatory confirmation checkboxes and justification
features_verified.Audit Trail: PASS - Logs all actions with user ID, timestamp, hash for integrity
features_verified.Reports Dashboard: PASS - Shows compliance score (57.1%) and metrics
features_verified.CSV Downloads: PASS - audit-logs, scenarios, breaches CSV downloads working
features_verified.CRM Command Center: PASS - Clients load (8 total), client details accessible, no errors
